{{Quote|We have the SD-9s outmatched, sir… All their attack strategies are in our memory banks.|An SD-10 at the [[Battle of Balmorra]]|<ref name="DEII1">[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''SD-10 battle droid''' was part of the [[SD-series battle droid/Legends|SD-series]] of [[Balmorran Arms/Legends|Balmorran Arms]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Like preceding models in the series, the SD-10 was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] fighting [[Droid/Legends|droid]] significantly larger than a [[Human/Legends|human]]. The model was designed by [[Umak Leth]].

==Characteristics==
Stronger and more intelligent that its predecessors, particularly the [[SD-9 battle droid|SD-9-series battle droid]], the SD-10 was equipped with experimental [[self-healing metal]]s, fast-reaction [[Servomotor/Legends|servomotors]], and [[point-of-impact shielding]]. The SD-10's forearms mounted a [[Miniature concussion missile system|miniature concussion missile launcher]], a [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]], and a [[Plasma cannon/Legends|plasma cannon]]. The SD-10 also featured an advanced combat sensor package.<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
[[File:SD10BattleDroids-DarkEmpireII-1.jpg|thumb|left|SD-10 battle droids alongside [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] soldiers during the Battle of Balmorra]]
Created in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] during the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand|campaign]], the SD-10 was manufactured in the vast droid foundries of [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]. Resentful of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence, [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Hinch Beltane]] had his engineers, technicians, and designers fit the SD-10s with fast-reaction servos, point-of-impact shield generators, and experimental self-healing metals. Their databanks also contained the tactics programmed into the SD-9s along with foolproof methods of defeating those tactics.

Following the Emperor's second death at the [[Battle of Pinnacle Base]], the Balmorrans rebelled. In response, the Emperor's [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Military Executor]], [[Sedriss QL]], moved to crush the revolt. Unwilling to resort to [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]], Sedriss landed ground forces, launching the [[Battle of Balmorra]]. During the battle, the SD-10s were deployed straight from the assembly lines and bested the SD-9s used by the Imperials. However, they were no match for the new Imperial [[Shadow Droid]]s. The Balmorrans then deployed their new [[X-1 Viper]]s, whose battle performance impressed the Executor enough for a truce to be called between the two warring factions.
